Affiliate Disclosure

Last updated: June 2026

Organize with Mary (a Lucente project) participates in affiliate marketing programs. This means that some of the links on this website are affiliate links — if you click on one and make a purchase, we may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.

What This Means for You

  • You pay the same price you would have paid without the affiliate link.
  • We earn a small percentage of the sale as a commission from the retailer.
  • This helps support the free content on this site.

Our Commitment to You

We only recommend products that we genuinely believe will help you organize your small space. We do not recommend products solely because they offer a commission. Our editorial opinions are our own and are not influenced by affiliate partnerships.

We always disclose affiliate relationships near the top of any blog post that contains affiliate links, and in our footer.

Affiliate Programs We Participate In

We may participate in affiliate programs, including retailer, marketplace, and brand partner programs. This list may be updated as partnerships change.

FTC Compliance

In accordance with the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) guidelines, we disclose any material connections between us and the products or services we recommend. Affiliate links constitute a material connection.

Questions?

If you have any questions about our affiliate relationships or how we select products, please contact us.

Organize with Mary

Renter-friendly organization for calm, clutter-free small spaces.
